hero.title: Master Flutter
hero.description: Real examples, interactive quizzes, and production-ready code. Start your Flutter journey today.

dart basics.description: Learn Dart syntax, variables, functions, and OOP concepts.

widgets.description: Explore Flutter widgets: Stateless, Stateful, and built-in components.

state management.description: Manage app state with Provider, BLoC, and other patterns.

api integration.description: Connect to REST APIs, handle JSON, and use HTTP requests.

advanced.description: Deep dive into animations, custom painters, and performance optimization.

seo.title: About This Tutorial Series
seo.description: Flutter is an open-source UI toolkit by Google used to build beautiful, natively compiled applications for mobile, web, and desktop from a single codebase. In this tutorial, you will learn Flutter step-by-step with real-world examples, covering widgets, layouts, state management, API integration, and advanced concepts.
